name: DatePicker
description: Calendar date picker supporting single date, date range, and year selection modes. Includes min/max date constraints and optional footer with Clear/Done buttons.

mode.description: Picker mode: single date, date range, or year selection

rangeValue.description: Selected range [Date | null, Date | null] (range mode)

onChange.description: Called when a single date is selected: (date: Date | null) => void

onRangeChange.description: Called when a date range is selected: (range: [Date | null, Date | null]) => void

onDone.description: Called when Done button is clicked

onClear.description: Called when Clear button is clicked

accessibility.role: Calendar grid uses grid role with columnheader for day labels
accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Each date button has aria-label with full date, aria-current for today, aria-pressed for selected dates

commonMistakes.correction: Use rangeValue={[start, end]} for range mode
DatePicker shows calendar UI, format display dates yourself
DatePicker is the calendar itself, not a popover trigger

examples.title: With Footer
examples.code:
<DatePicker
  mode="single"
  value={date}
  onChange={setDate}
  showFooter
  onDone={() => setOpen(false)}
  onClear={() => setDate(null)}
/>

examples.title: With Min/Max Constraints
examples.code:
<DatePicker
  mode="single"
  value={date}
  onChange={setDate}
  minDate={new Date()}
  maxDate={new Date(2025, 11, 31)}
/>

examples.title: Inside a Modal
examples.code:
<Modal open={showDatePicker} onClose={() => setShowDatePicker(false)} title="Select Date">
  <DatePicker
    mode="single"
    value={date}
    onChange={setDate}
    showFooter
    onDone={() => setShowDatePicker(false)}
  />
</Modal>
